patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/testing.py b/asgiref/testing.py
index d6ccee5..9e15bbb 100644
--- a/asgiref/testing.py
+++ b/asgiref/testing.py
@@ -27,12 +27,12 @@ class ApplicationCommunicator:
             self._input_queue = asyncio.Queue()
         return self._input_queue
 
+    @property
     @property
     def output_queue(self):
         if self._output_queue is None:
             self._output_queue = asyncio.Queue()
         return self._output_queue
-
     @property
     def future(self):
         if self._future is None:
diff --git a/asgiref/timeout.py b/asgiref/timeout.py
index fd5381d..254bc05 100644
--- a/asgiref/timeout.py
+++ b/asgiref/timeout.py
@@ -112,7 +112,8 @@ class timeout:
         self._task = None
         return None
 
-    def _cancel_task(self) -> None:
-        if self._task is not None:
-            self._task.cancel()
+    def _cancel_task (self) -> None :
+        if not self._cancelled:
             self._cancelled = True
+            if self._task is not None and not self._task.done():
+                self._task.cancel()
\ No newline at end of file
